description: maharashtra.gov.in is the Government of Maharashtra’s web domain, hosting public-service and departmental websites. It includes public information portals and some department-specific web applications, including at least one documented API host.
summary: maharashtra.gov.in exposes a small public web data surface at mahasdb.maharashtra.gov.in and an additional documented HTTP API at pmkapi.maharashtra.gov.in with undetermined authentication; no GraphQL, MCP, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec was found.

surfaces.name: Maharashtra State Data Bank website data endpoints
